goal: 修复 Agent 配置遗漏：1) opencode.json 中 builder 的 bash 权限添加 bash *、steps 从 15 调整为 25；2) opencode.json 中 code-reviewer 添加 steps: 15；3) builder.md 可用构建命令表添加 bun run verify 和 bun run audit
verification: builder.md markdown 格式完整性检查

coverage_checklist.builder_bash_permission: assert: opencode.json builder 的 bash 权限列表中新增 bash *: allow
coverage_checklist.builder_steps_25: assert: opencode.json builder 的 steps 值从 15 改为 25
coverage_checklist.code_reviewer_steps: assert: opencode.json code-reviewer 配置中新增 steps: 15
coverage_checklist.builder_cmd_verify: assert: builder.md 可用构建命令表新增 bun run verify 行
coverage_checklist.builder_cmd_audit: assert: builder.md 可用构建命令表新增 bun run audit 行
coverage_checklist.opencode_json_valid: assert: opencode.json 仍是合法 JSON
